about: Cherise is a Portland, Maine-based painter working primarily in oil on canvas and panel. Her work orbits around the emotional resonance of everyday scenes — coastal landscapes at the edge of weather, still-life arrangements caught in shifting afternoon light, and quiet domestic interiors that feel both intimate and slightly untethered. Drawing on a background in textile design, she often incorporates mixed media and found materials, treating the surface of a painting as something to be built as much as brushed.

After studying fine art at the Maine College of Art & Design, Cherise spent several years painting commercially before turning to her own practice full-time in 2022. Since then she has exhibited in galleries across New England and the Southeast, and her work lives in private collections throughout the United States. When she is not in the studio she is probably walking the Eastern Promenade with an iced coffee, regardless of the season.
